name: tp-rust
description: Principled Rust project skills — scaffold single crates and multi-crate workspaces with edition 2024 / MSRV 1.81 defaults, set up the CI + clippy + nextest + cargo-deny quality pipeline, and ship releases with version policy, changelog generation, publishing, and supply-chain hardening. Four skills covering the full Rust lifecycle: rust-scaffold, rust-workspace, rust-quality, rust-release.
